## 2026-05-11 - Added keyboard focus to file upload controls
**Learning:** File upload drag-and-drop zones and file removal buttons generated by React components in this app lacked explicit keyboard focus indicators (focus-visible classes), creating a confusing experience for keyboard users trying to submit documents.
**Action:** Always ensure that any interactive element, especially custom divs and dynamically generated utility buttons, have explicit focus-visible styles to ensure full keyboard navigation support.

## 2026-06-21 - Added consistent keyboard focus visibility to global buttons
**Learning:** Found that custom global button utility classes like `.ui-btn-primary` lacked consistent keyboard focus visibility out of the box, meaning components using them could fail accessibility checks without manually adding Tailwind focus classes each time.
**Action:** Always bake robust keyboard accessibility styles (like `focus-visible:ring-2`) directly into base global CSS utility classes rather than applying them repetitively at every component instantiation to ensure complete and maintainable global coverage.
